zh.lifeSummary: 當George Packard於1575年出生在英國素福爾可斯頓哈姆 阿斯帕爾時，他的父親Moses John Packard Third Earl of Stonham38歲，母親Joan Avis37歲。他於1600年3月27日與Mary Wyther在英國素福爾可武爾皮特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭素福爾可被列為yeoman farmer。他去世於1623年12月14日在他的家鄉享年48歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可斯頓哈姆 阿斯帕爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Packard于1575年出生在英国素福爾可斯頓哈姆 阿斯帕爾时，他的父亲Moses John Packard Third Earl of Stonham38岁，母亲Joan Avis37岁。他于1600年3月27日与Mary Wyther在英国素福爾可武爾皮特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰素福爾可被列为yeoman farmer。他去世于1623年12月14日在他的家乡享年48岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可斯頓哈姆 阿斯帕爾。

nameMeanings.name: Packard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English pak(e) ‘pack, bundle’ + the Anglo-Norman French pejorative suffix -ard, probably a derogatory occupational name for a peddler.
English: pejorative derivative of the Middle English personal name   Pack  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Packert, Päckert, from ancient Germanic personal names formed with a word meaning ‘battle’ or ‘to fight’; or a variant of Packer 2 (with excrescent -t).

variants.name: Pack
meanings: English (Kent and Devon): variant of Pask , derived from Middle English Pake ‘Easter, Passover’.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): metonymic occupational name for a wholesale trader, from Middle Low German packe, German Pack ‘bundle, package’ (see Packer ). Compare Pak .
Dutch: variant, archaic or Americanized, of   Pak  , a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When George Packard was born in 1575, in Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, England, his father, Moses John Packard Third Earl of Stonham, was 38 and his mother, Joan Avis, was 37. He married Mary Wyther on 27 March 1600, in Woolpit, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. His occupation is listed as yeoman farmer in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. He died on 14 December 1623, in his hometown, at the age of 48, and was buried in Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Packard est né en 1575, à Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Moses John Packard Third Earl of Stonham, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Joan Avis, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Mary Wyther le 27 mars 1600, à Woolpit, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est yeoman farmer à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 14 décembre 1623, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Packard 1575 in Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Moses John Packard Third Earl of Stonham 38 und seine Mutter Joan Avis 37. Er hat am 27. März 1600 in Woolpit, Suffolk, England Mary Wyther geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als yeoman farmer in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 14. Dezember 1623 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Packard è nato il nel 1575 nel Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Moses John Packard Third Earl of Stonham, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Joan Avis, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Mary Wyther il 27 marzo 1600, nel Woolpit, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come yeoman farmer nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 14 dicembre 1623, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, England.

ko.lifeSummary: George Packard(이)가 1575년 영국 수폴크 스토함 아스팔에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Moses John Packard Third Earl of Stonham(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Avis(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1600년 3월 27일 영국 수폴크 보피에서 Mary Wyther(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 yeoman farmer이었다. 그는 1623년 12월 14일 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 스토함 아스팔에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Packard nasceu em 1575, em Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Moses John Packard Third Earl of Stonham, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Joan Avis, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Wyther em 27 de março de 1600, em Woolpit, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como yeoman farmer em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 14 de dezembro de 1623, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Packard родился в 1575 г. в местности стонам аспаль, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Moses John Packard Third Earl of Stonham было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Avis, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Wyther 27 марта 1600 г. в местности вулпит, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери.  Он работал по профессии yeoman farmer в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 14 декабря 1623 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности стонам аспаль, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Packard nació en 1575, en Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Moses John Packard Third Earl of Stonham, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Joan Avis, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Mary Wyther el 27 de marzo de 1600, en Woolpit, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era yeoman farmer en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 14 de diciembre de 1623, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
